first_run.rationale: The score is identical (2/10) in both evaluations, and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both the justification, strengths, and concerns sections focus on the same core issues: the candidate's lack of mandatory C++ and financial domain experience. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or concerns based on the change of all job locations to India.
